# Plugins

Bundled subprocess plugins; the mature one is story_develop (the implement‚Üíreview‚Üífix cycle).

**Tier:** Core

## Public API

### `lithos_loom.plugins.echo.__main__`
- def `main`

### `lithos_loom.plugins.prd_decompose.__main__`
- def `main` ‚Äî Stub ‚Äî implement per the prd-decompose story in docs/prd/orchestration.md.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.__main__`
- def `main`

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.agent_session`
- def `build_run_cmd` ‚Äî Build (container_name, docker-run-argv) for an agent container.
- class `PauseBudget` ‚Äî The run's shared usage-limit pause budget, in seconds.
- def `resume_after_from` ‚Äî When an interrupted run should be retried (PRD decision #5, T10).
- def `turn_with_limit_pauses` ‚Äî Run a turn, pausing-and-retrying through provider usage limits.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.autoformat`
- def `build_format_command` ‚Äî Build the one-shot ``docker run`` argv for one formatter run.
- def `resolve_formatters` ‚Äî The runnable write-mode formatter commands for *wt*, probed once for the run.
- def `run_format_pass` ‚Äî Format the coder's commit in isolation and commit any change separately.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.check_catalog`
- class `CheckMapping` ‚Äî One canonical check's command per ecosystem.
- class `DesiredCheck` ‚Äî What a profile (or the default) *asks for* ‚Äî the input to resolution.
- class `CheckApplicabilityError` ‚Äî A *required* desired check has no command for any detected ecosystem.
- def `formatter_commands` ‚Äî The write-mode formatter command for each detected ecosystem, in order.
- def `applies` ‚Äî Whether the canonical check *name* applies to at least one detected ecosystem. ``applies(name, ())`` is always ``False`` ‚Äî a markerless repo declares every check N/A.
- def `resolve_check_set` ‚Äî Resolve a *desired* check-set into concrete checks for *ecosystems*.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.check_runner`
- def `build_check_set` ‚Äî The Review-Profile-selected check-set for this run (#140, ADR ¬ß3/¬ß4).
- def `merge_check_sets` ‚Äî Append *extra*'s results to *base* (the approval-candidate merge, #140).
- def `check_result_blocks` ‚Äî Whether a single **required** check holds approval (#140, ADR ¬ß4/¬ß5).
- def `gate_floor_blocks` ‚Äî Whether the deterministic floor blocks approval (#140, ADR ¬ß4/¬ß5).
- def `run_check_set` ‚Äî Run an ordered check-set against one round commit.
- def `load_gate_ledger` ‚Äî The run's deterministic-finding ledger (#132) ‚Äî reloaded from disk on a resume (a re-dispatched run reuses ``gate_dir``), else a fresh ledger.
- def `persist_gate_ledger` ‚Äî Write the gate ledger so closure survives across rounds + a resume. Best-effort: a write failure must not fail the run.
- def `run_delivery_test_gate` ‚Äî The *delivery* regression gate: run ONLY the ``test`` check on a fix commit.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.check_set`
- class `Check` ‚Äî The spec for one deterministic check ‚Äî what to run and how it counts.
- class `CheckResult` ‚Äî The outcome of running one :class:`Check` against a round commit.
- class `CheckSetResult` ‚Äî The aggregate outcome of running an ordered check-set for one round.
- def `classify_execution` ‚Äî Map a raw container outcome onto the ``execution_outcome`` axis.
- def `render_check_summary` ‚Äî Render the round's check-set for prompt injection (ADR ¬ß6).

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.config`
- def `is_valid_reviewer_name` ‚Äî True if *name* is a safe slug for container / path / filename use.
- class `ReviewerSpec` ‚Äî One named reviewer: its persona, strictness, and tooling (T6).
- def `parse_model` ‚Äî Validate + normalise a ``model`` value: a non-empty string, or ``None``.
- def `parse_image` ‚Äî Validate + normalise a sandbox container ``image`` value, or ``None``.
- def `parse_test_command` ‚Äî Validate + normalise a gate ``test_command`` override, or ``None``.
- def `parse_bool_setting` ‚Äî Validate a boolean develop setting (``develop_test_gate`` etc.), or ``None``.
- def `parse_effort` ‚Äî Validate + normalise a reasoning-effort level, or ``None``.
- def `parse_reviewer_entry` ‚Äî Validate one reviewer mapping into a :class:`ReviewerSpec`.
- def `load_develop_config` ‚Äî Parse a ``--develop-config`` TOML file into reviewer specs.
- class `DevelopConfig` ‚Äî Everything ``develop()`` needs for one run.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.containers`
- def `container_name` ‚Äî Stable, unique-per-run container name, e.g. ``loom-develop-ab12cd34-coder``.
- def `build_run_command` ‚Äî Build the ``docker run`` argv for a long-lived idle agent container.
- def `build_exec_command` ‚Äî Build the ``docker exec`` argv for one agent turn (coder or reviewer).
- def `start_container` ‚Äî Run ``docker run -d`` and return the container id (stdout).
- def `exec_turn` ‚Äî Run ``docker exec`` for one turn with stdin closed (no 3s stdin wait).
- def `stop_container` ‚Äî Force-remove the container; never raises (teardown must be best-effort).

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.daemon_io`
- def `read_task_payload` ‚Äî Parse the runner's ``task.json`` into a :class:`TaskContext`.
- class `ProjectDevelopSettings` ‚Äî The resolved per-project develop config for one daemon-mode run.
- def `resolve_project_settings` ‚Äî Resolve the daemon-mode run's develop config (PRD lookup contract).
- def `apply_cli_fallbacks` ‚Äî Layer route-level CLI model/effort flags UNDER the resolved settings.
- def `load_tool_default_models` ‚Äî The host loom config's ``[story_develop].default_models`` (best-effort).
- def `load_operator_github_login` ‚Äî The host loom config's ``[story_develop].operator_github_login`` (#113).
- def `apply_tool_default_models` ‚Äî Fill each agent's model from the per-tool global default where still unset.
- def `load_review_profile_policy` ‚Äî The host loom config's ``[story_develop]`` review-profile policy (#139).
- def `apply_review_profile` ‚Äî Resolve the Review Profile (#139) and fold the outcome into *settings*.
- def `profile_panel` ‚Äî The reviewer panel for a Review Profile's personas (#140 slice 2), or ``None`` for a gate-only profile (``minimal``) so the caller keeps its built-in default.
- def `apply_review_profile_panel` ‚Äî Substitute the resolved profile's persona panel for the *default* reviewer (#140 slice 2 ‚Äî replace-default-only).
- def `post_frictions` ‚Äî Post config-resolution breadcrumbs as one ``[Friction]`` finding.
- def `build_result_payload` ‚Äî Map a :class:`DevelopResult` onto the result.json contract.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.develop`
- class `DevelopResult` ‚Äî Outcome of a ``develop()`` run.
- def `develop` ‚Äî Run the develop loop and return a result.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.engines`
- class `TurnResult` ‚Äî Outcome of one agent turn (tool-independent).
- class `Engine` ‚Äî What a coder/reviewer tool must provide to run under story-develop.
- class `ClaudeEngine`
- class `CodexEngine`
- def `get_engine` ‚Äî The :class:`Engine` for *tool*, or ``ValueError`` naming the supported set.
- def `is_supported` ‚Äî Whether the container/exec layer can run *tool* (claude + codex, #94).
- def `supported_tools` ‚Äî The registered tool names, in registry order.
- def `supported_tools_phrase` ‚Äî Registry-derived ``'a' or 'b'`` list of tools, for operator error messages.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.findings`
- class `LedgerEntry` ‚Äî One finding's life across rounds (mutable; owned by the ledger).
- class `FindingLedger` ‚Äî Per-reviewer finding registry with plugin-assigned monotonic ids.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.gate_adapters`
- def `command_tool` ‚Äî The real tool a *command* runs, past a ``uv run`` prefix and a pipeline producer.
- def `machine_command` ‚Äî The machine (JSON) invocation of *base* for *tool*, or *base* unchanged for a tool with no adapter. E.g. ``ruff check`` -> ``ruff check --output-format=json --exit-zero``.
- def `parse_findings` ‚Äî Parse *tool*'s *output* into findings for *check*; ``[]`` if unsupported, empty, or off-format (defensive ‚Äî never raises on bad tool output).

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.gate_findings`
- class `GateFinding` ‚Äî One deterministic finding from a gate check (already severity-mapped).
- class `GateLedger` ‚Äî Gate-owned registry of deterministic findings with stable per-check ids.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.handoff`
- def `severity_at_or_above` ‚Äî True if *severity* meets or exceeds *threshold* (minor < major < critical).
- def `max_severity` ‚Äî Highest severity in the list, or ``None`` when empty.
- class `HandoffError` ‚Äî A handoff file was missing required structure or had invalid values.
- class `Finding` ‚Äî One addressable review finding (see ``prompts/FORMAT.md``).
- class `ReviewHandoff` ‚Äî A parsed reviewer handoff: a verdict plus structured findings.
- def `load_prompt` ‚Äî Read a packaged prompt template (e.g. ``coder_init.md``).
- def `render_prompt` ‚Äî Placeholder substitution that is safe against braces in the values.
- def `render_findings` ‚Äî Render a reviewer's findings as a compact block for the coder's prompt.
- def `coder_handoff_name` ‚Äî Filename for the coder's handoff in a given round (1-based).
- def `reviewer_handoff_name` ‚Äî Filename for a reviewer's handoff in a given round.
- def `conversation_log` ‚Äî Assemble an ordered, human-readable log of every round's handoffs.
- def `seed_handoff_dir` ‚Äî Create *handoff_dir* and write ``FORMAT.md`` into it.
- def `parse_review_handoff` ‚Äî Parse + validate a reviewer handoff. Raises :class:`HandoffError`.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.idempotency`
- def `store_dir` ‚Äî Resolve the host-persistent idempotency store directory.
- def `lookup_completed` ‚Äî Return the recorded result payload for *key* iff it is replayable.
- def `lookup_completed_for_run` ‚Äî Find a replayable completed record for one specific run, by its run id.
- def `record_completion` ‚Äî Persist *payload* as the completed-run record for *key* (atomic write).

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.limits`
- def `classify_failure` ‚Äî Classify a FAILED turn as ``usage_limited`` or ``agent_error``.
- def `reset_hint` ‚Äî Best-effort parse of WHEN the limit resets, or ``None`` if unknown.
- class `PausePlan` ‚Äî How long to wait before retrying a usage-limited turn.
- def `pause_plan` ‚Äî Compute the next wait, or ``None`` when the pause budget is exhausted.
- def `next_fallback_tool` ‚Äî The tool after *current* in *chain*, or ``None`` when exhausted.
- def `record_failure_fixture` ‚Äî Persist a failed turn's raw output as a classification fixture (G4).

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.lithos_io`
- class `TaskContext` ‚Äî What the plugin needs from a Lithos task to run against it.
- class `LithosIOError` ‚Äî A Lithos round-trip operation failed (fetch is fatal; post is not).
- def `fetch_task_context` ‚Äî Fetch the task and distil the run context. Raises :class:`LithosIOError`.
- def `post_results` ‚Äî Post the run outcome back to the task. Returns True when fully posted.
- def `complete_task` ‚Äî Mark the task completed (``--complete-on-approval`` opt-in only).

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.panel`
- class `ReviewOutcome` ‚Äî The result of a single reviewer's pass in one round.
- def `findings_by_severity` ‚Äî Count a panel's findings by severity (ADR 0003 ¬ß11 review-metadata record).
- class `PanelRoundResult` ‚Äî One round of the reviewer panel ‚Äî the shared review primitive's result.
- class `ReviewerState` ‚Äî Mutable per-reviewer run state (container, session, tool, ledger).
- def `run_panel_round` ‚Äî Drive the reviewer panel for a single round ‚Äî the one shared primitive.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.personas`
- def `canonical_personas` ‚Äî The canonical reviewer personas, keyed by name (ADR 0003 ¬ß8).

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.pr_delivery`
- class `CopilotComment` ‚Äî One Copilot inline comment, as fetched from the PR.
- class `DeliveryOutcome` ‚Äî What the delivery phase did (for the summary + Lithos posting).
- def `parse_issue_ref` ‚Äî ``https://github.com/o/r/issues/42`` -> ``("o/r", 42)``; None if not.
- def `closes_line` ‚Äî The ``Closes ‚Ä¶`` line linking the PR to its source issue, or ``""``.
- def `build_pr_body` ‚Äî The generated PR body: provenance + verdicts, not the whole log.
- def `comments_to_handoff_text` ‚Äî Render Copilot's inline comments as a synthetic review handoff.
- def `reply_body` ‚Äî The per-thread reply: fix reference, held-back notice, or pushback.
- def `push_branch` ‚Äî Host-side push of the worktree branch to origin. Raises on failure.
- def `repo_name_with_owner` ‚Äî ``owner/repo`` of the worktree's origin (via gh).
- def `create_pr` ‚Äî Open the PR; returns its URL. Raises on failure.
- def `pr_number_from_url`
- def `request_copilot` ‚Äî Request the Copilot reviewer; False (logged) on failure ‚Äî non-fatal.
- def `request_operator_review` ‚Äî Request *login* as a reviewer on the PR; assign them if they authored it.
- def `copilot_expected_comments` ‚Äî The comment count Copilot's review summary claims, or status markers.
- def `fetch_copilot_comments` ‚Äî Copilot's top-level inline comments on the PR (replies excluded).
- def `wait_for_copilot` ‚Äî Poll until Copilot's review lands; its expected comment count, or ``None`` on timeout (see :func:`copilot_expected_comments`).
- def `fetch_copilot_comments_settled` ‚Äî Fetch Copilot's inline comments, waiting for them to MATERIALISE.
- def `post_thread_reply`
- def `post_pr_comment`
- def `delivery_budget_seconds` ‚Äî Upper bound on the wall-clock :func:`deliver` can legitimately spend (#189).
- def `deliver_guarded` ‚Äî Guarded PR delivery for an approved run ‚Äî shared daemon/standalone seam.
- def `deliver` ‚Äî Push the approved branch and open the PR, then run the Copilot round.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.profiles`
- class `MonotonicityError` ‚Äî A profile chain violates the ``strength_rank`` monotonicity invariant (ADR ¬ß2).
- class `ProfileCheck` ‚Äî One deterministic check a profile asks the gate to run.
- class `ReviewProfile` ‚Äî A named {panel, check-set, blocking policy} bundle (ADR ¬ß1).
- def `validate_monotonic` ‚Äî Enforce the ADR ¬ß2 monotonicity invariant or raise :class:`MonotonicityError`.
- def `get_profile` ‚Äî The canonical :class:`ReviewProfile` for *name*, or the built-in default.
- class `ProfileResolution` ‚Äî The outcome of :func:`resolve_profile`.
- def `resolve_profile` ‚Äî Resolve the selected Review Profile (ADR ¬ß2).

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.review_only`
- def `review_change` ‚Äî Run the panel + deterministic gate against an existing *change*.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.review_report`
- class `ReviewFinding` ‚Äî One finding a reviewer raised against the change.
- class `ReviewerReport` ‚Äî One reviewer's verdict on the change.
- class `GateCheckReport` ‚Äî One deterministic check's outcome on the change's head tree.
- class `ReviewReport` ‚Äî Consolidated panel + gate result for a single existing change.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.review_resolve`
- class `ResolvedChange` ‚Äî A concrete change to review: the ``base..head`` commit pair + intent.
- def `resolve_change` ‚Äî Resolve *spec* into a :class:`ResolvedChange`.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.rounds`
- class `Services` ‚Äî The side-effecting seams the round pipeline depends on, injected so the loop is testable with fakes (ARCH-1.S4).

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.run_outcome`
- def `read_state` ‚Äî The run's terminal ``state.json`` (status + rounds + branch), or ``None``.
- def `result_for_run` ‚Äî THIS run's ``result.json`` (the plugin's final contract output), or ``None``.
- def `delivery_complete` ‚Äî Whether THIS approved run's post-dialogue PR delivery succeeded.
- def `delivery_failed` ‚Äî The reason THIS run's PR delivery FAILED (#194), or ``None``.
- def `delivery_deadline` ‚Äî The instant this run's delivery budget expires (#189), or ``None``.
- def `delivery_timed_out` ‚Äî Whether an in-flight delivery has exceeded its bound (#189).
- def `record_delivery_deadline` ‚Äî Record when this run's PR delivery budget expires, for `develop attach` (#189).
- def `record_delivery_failure` ‚Äî Mark this run's PR delivery as FAILED in its private delivery.json (#194).
- def `run_phase` ‚Äî Classify the run for ``attach``: ``"running"`` / ``"delivering"`` / ``"terminal"`` / ``"vanished"``.
- class `RunOutcome` ‚Äî A run's terminal outcome, captured the moment ``attach`` detects it.
- def `recover_reaped_outcome` ‚Äî Recover a **reaped** run's outcome from the host-persistent completion store.
- def `state_from_completion_record` ‚Äî Translate a completion-store record (a ``result.json`` payload) into the ``state.json``-shaped dict ``attach`` renders from.
- def `delivered_pr_url` ‚Äî The delivered PR url for an approved run, or ``None`` (#188).
- def `capture_outcome` ‚Äî Snapshot the terminal outcome into *outcome* from the already-read *state*.
- def `is_clean_success` ‚Äî Whether the run reached the only success status (``approved``) **and** fully delivered.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.test_gate`
- class `GateResult` ‚Äî Outcome of one test-gate run against a round commit.
- def `export_tree` ‚Äî Export the tree of *sha* into *dest* (``git archive | tar -x``).
- def `build_probe_command` ‚Äî Build a one-shot ``docker run`` that prints which *tools* exist in *image*.
- def `build_gate_command` ‚Äî Build the one-shot ``docker run`` argv for a gate run.
- def `select_command` ‚Äî First candidate whose argv[0] is in *available_tools* (gate's pick).
- def `probe_tools` ‚Äî Return the subset of *tools* that exist in *image* (one probe container).
- def `run_gate_container` ‚Äî Run the gate container and capture its outcome; never raises on red.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_develop.turns`
- def `parse_claude_result` ‚Äî Delegate to :meth:`ClaudeEngine.parse_turn` (kept until callers migrate, E2).
- def `parse_codex_result` ‚Äî Delegate to :meth:`CodexEngine.parse_turn` (kept until callers migrate, E2).
- def `run_turn` ‚Äî Execute one agent turn in *container* via *engine* and return its result.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_implement.__main__`
- def `main` ‚Äî Stub ‚Äî superseded by story-develop; see US-2 in docs/prd/orchestration.md.

### `lithos_loom.plugins.story_review_human.__main__`
- def `main` ‚Äî Stub ‚Äî superseded by story-develop; see US-2 in docs/prd/orchestration.md.

## Dependencies

- Depends on: [Config](Config.md), [Errors](Errors.md), [LithosClient](LithosClient.md), [Runners](Runners.md)
- Used by: [Cli](Cli.md), [Evals](Evals.md)

## ADRs

- [ADR 0002 ‚Äî `story-develop` session mechanism: live container + resumable exec, not a live REPL](../../adr/0002-story-develop-session-mechanism.md)
- [Feature: Code-quality review strength ‚Äî Review Profiles + multi-check deterministic gate](../../adr/0003-code-quality-review-strength.context.md)
- [ADR 0003 ‚Äî Code quality & review strength: selectable Review Profiles + a multi-check deterministic gate](../../adr/0003-code-quality-review-strength.md)
- [ADR 0004 ‚Äî Review-only mode: run the panel + gate on an existing change](../../adr/0004-review-only-mode.md)
- [ADR 0006 ‚Äî Review-panel variance: measure before reducing](../../adr/0006-review-variance-measure-before-reducing.md)
